narrative:
32Thorns (precinct in Perry County) has 445 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.5 percentage points.
